head.b:skin: :root{color-scheme:light dark;--bg:#f9f9f9;--surface:#fff;--text:#343434;--muted:#777;--soft:#eee;--line:#e8e8e8;--accent:#DAB264;--button-bg:#111;--button-text:#fff;--focus:#DAB264;--link:#3367D6;--heading:#303030;--max:1160px;--radius:10px;--shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.06);--body:"Libre Franklin",Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;--display:"Newsreader",Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif;--page-bg:#f9f9f9;--surface-soft:#f7f7f7;--text-soft:#777;--border:#e8e8e8;--space-xs:6px;--space-sm:10px;--space-md:16px;--space-lg:26px;--space-xl:42px;--space-xxl:64px}html[data-theme="light"]{color-scheme:light}html[data-theme="dark"]{color-scheme:dark}#navigation-wrapper li.theme-control{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:42px;margin-left:14px;padding:0;vertical-align:top}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch{position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:46px;height:24px;padding:0;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;background:var(--surface-soft);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.10);transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-track{position:relative;display:block;width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:inherit}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-thumb{position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--surface);box-shadow:0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.22);transform:translateX(0);transition:transform .2s ease,background-color .2s ease;z-index:2}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-icon{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:1;font-size:10px;line-height:1;color:var(--muted);opacity:.75;pointer-events:none}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-sun{left:7px}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-moon{right:7px}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch[data-effective="dark"]{background:#15243a;border-color:rgba(218,178,100,.55);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(218,178,100,.16),inset 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch[data-effective="dark"] .theme-switch-thumb{transform:translateX(22px);background:var(--focus)}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch[data-effective="dark"] .theme-switch-moon,#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch[data-effective="light"] .theme-switch-sun{color:var(--button-bg);opacity:.95}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch:hover,#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch:focus-visible{border-color:var(--focus);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(218,178,100,.20)}@media(max-width:720px){#navigation-wrapper li.theme-control{display:flex;justify-content:center;height:auto;margin:10px 0 0;padding:10px 0 2px}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch{width:48px;height:24px}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch-thumb{width:20px;height:20px}#navigation-wrapper .theme-switch[data-effective="dark"] .theme-switch-thumb{transform:translateX(24px)}}.theme-switch-mobile{display:none}@media(max-width:720px){#navigation{position:sticky}.theme-switch-mobile{position:absolute;right:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:48px;height:24px;padding:0;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;background:var(--surface-soft);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.10);transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease;z-index:3}.theme-switch-mobile .theme-switch-track{position:relative;display:block;width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:inherit}.theme-switch-mobile .theme-switch-thumb{position:absolute;top:2px;left:2px;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--surface);box-shadow:0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.22);transform:translateX(0);transition:transform .2s ease,background-color .2s ease;z-index:2}.theme-switch-mobile .theme-switch-icon{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:1;font-size:9px;line-height:1;color:var(--muted);opacity:.75;pointer-events:none}.theme-switch-mobile .theme-switch-sun{left:7px}.theme-switch-mobile .theme-switch-moon{right:7px}.theme-switch-mobile[data-effective="dark"]{background:#15243a;border-color:rgba(218,178,100,.55);box-shadow:0 0 12px h2,.post-body h3{font-size-adjust:0.47}*{box-sizing:border-box}html{scroll-behavior:smooth}body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--body);font-size:16px;line-height:1.65;transition:background-color
